## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets explaining the change in plain language. -->

-

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new capability (skill, agent, command, rule, doc layer)
- [ ] fix — fixes a bug or broken reference
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — restructure without behavior change
- [ ] chore — tooling, CI, gitignore, repo hygiene

## OS coherence checklist

- [ ] Canonical structure preserved (no duplicates outside `.claude/`).
- [ ] If a new agent/skill/command was added, it is referenced from `README.md` or relevant docs.
- [ ] If a path was renamed or deleted, all cross-references updated.
- [ ] Version metadata reconciled (README badge, CHANGELOG, RELEASE-NOTES) if this is a release.
- [ ] No personal data, secrets, or private project content introduced.
- [ ] `session-log/` updated for material decisions.
- [ ] PR opened from a **fork** or feature branch — no direct commits to `main` (branch is protected).
